facebook.caption:
POV: you're in Cửa Lấp, hungry, and you walk into Bánh Mì & You.

4.8 stars. 672 reviews. This place earns every single one.

The bánh mì here hits different. Crispy roll, loaded fillings, zero fuss. The kind of spot you return to twice before you even leave Phu Quoc.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 672 people rated this 4.8 stars and they were right. Watch the crunch on that bánh mì roll at Bánh Mì & You in Cửa Lấp. This is lunch sorted.
